originalTitle: WhatsApp is launching usernames: here’s how to reserve yours
summary: WhatsApp is introducing a new way to add and chat with contacts, without having to share your phone number. Usernames will launch "later this year," in a move to make the communications platform "even more private," allowing you to keep your phone number concealed from people who aren't already in your contacts. Usernames are available […]
content: WhatsApp is introducing a new way to add and chat with contacts, without having to share your phone number. Usernames will launch “later this year,” in a move to make the communications platform “even more private,” allowing you to keep your phone number concealed from people who aren’t already in your contacts. Usernames are available to reserve starting this week, giving you time to claim a specific handle you may already be using elsewhere before the WhatsApp username feature officially launches. The username launch will be rolling out gradually over the coming months, and users will be notified when the feature is available in their country. “With over three billion people on WhatsApp a lot of names overlap, which is why we’re opening reservations early so everyone has the opportunity to select the username that matters to them,” WhatsApp said in its announcement. [Image: Here’s how you can enable the username key feature when it rolls out later this year. https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Reserve-WhatsApp-username-.gif?quality=90&strip=all] You can reserve your username by heading to Settings > Account > Username in the latest version of WhatsApp on Android, or by tapping You, selecting your profile, and tapping on Create Username for iOS users. Individuals and organizations will have the option to claim their existing Instagram or Facebook handles, as long as it hasn’t been taken by another user. WhatsApp product head Alice Newton-Rex told The Verge that usernames for famous figures like celebrities and politicians have already been reserved to prevent them from being claimed — so if you share a name with a recognized public figure, you’ll have to create an alternative handle. You can’t browse for people using their usernames, so you’ll need to know the exact username of a new contact before you can reach out to them. If you’ve already shared your phone number with WhatsApp contacts or group chats, the number will still be visible to them after you enable the username feature, so these privacy protections only apply to new conversations going forward. WhatsApp is also introducing an “optional username key” that others will need to know before they can message you, to help you control who can reach you with a WhatsApp username if it’s made public without your consent. Update, June 29th: Clarified how to reserve your WhatsApp username across both iOS and Android, now that the FAQ page is live.
chineseTitle: WhatsApp 正在推出用户名：以下是如何保留您的用户名
chineseSummary: WhatsApp 推出了一种新的方式来添加联系人并与联系人聊天，而无需共享您的电话号码。用户名将于“今年晚些时候”推出，此举将使通信平台“更加私密”，让您可以对不在您的联系人中的人隐藏您的电话号码。用户名可用 [...]
chineseContent: WhatsApp 推出了一种新的方式来添加联系人并与联系人聊天，而无需共享您的电话号码。用户名将于“今年晚些时候”推出，此举旨在使通信平台“更加私密”，让您可以对不在您的联系人中的人隐藏您的电话号码。用户名从本周开始可供预订，这样您就有时间在 WhatsApp 用户名功能正式启动之前申请您可能已经在其他地方使用的特定用户名。用户名的推出将在未来几个月内逐步推出，当该功能在其所在国家/地区可用时，用户将收到通知。 WhatsApp 在声明中表示：“WhatsApp 上有超过 30 亿用户，很多名字都是重叠的，这就是为什么我们提前开放预订，这样每个人都有机会选择对他们来说重要的用户名。” [图片：以下是在今年晚些时候推出时启用用户名密钥功能的方法。 https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Reserve-WhatsApp-username-.gif?quality=90&strip=all] 您可以通过前往 Android 版 WhatsApp 最新版本中的“设置”>“帐户”>“用户名”来保留您的用户名，或者点击“您”，选择您的个人资料，然后点击“为 iOS 用户创建用户名”。个人和组织可以选择声明其现有的 Instagram 或 Facebook 帐号，只要该帐号未被其他用户占用。 WhatsApp 产品负责人 Alice Newton-Rex 告诉 The Verge，名人和政客等著名人物的用户名已经被保留，以防止他们被认领——因此，如果你与知名公众人物共用一个名字，你就必须创建一个替代的用户名。您无法使用用户名浏览人员，因此您
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
